case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. SABER B TROUDI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF DECLARATION OF HENRY YANDELL RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100149457) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 100144878) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT IN REGARDS TO ALL COUNTS; SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION : QUANTUM MERUIT (TRANSACTION ID # 100144878) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TROUDI, SABER B , AKA SABER, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-17-2020
DECLARATION OF REDACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100144878) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TROUDI, SABER B , AKA SABER, AN INDIVIDUAL $11,150.41 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,585.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100144878)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-04-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
